_note: PASS 1 usage tallies. Frequencies are direct token/recipe references in src (excluding panda.config.ts definitions and generated styled-system). Hand-rolled reimplementations are NOT counted as usage — they are leaks tracked in the inventory.

textStyle_usage._comment: 6/10 textStyles have ZERO `textStyle:` adoption. They are not dead conceptually — they are REIMPLEMENTED inline: sectionHeadline≈Manifesto.title/ThemeArtists.headline, cardTitle≈FeaturedEvents.name, labelText/labelSmall≈Hero tape labels + ArtistsBanner.ctaText + VisitSection.directionsLink + EditionsNav.year/theme. heroBody duplicates `lead` exactly.

layerStyle_usage._comment: All 5 used. But `section` (the padding layerStyle) is bypassed by pages that open with sectionDark/sectionLight then re-add paddingBlock:sectionY + paddingInline:content by hand (home page.recipe:124, partners page.tsx:97-101, press 46/50/127, editions 38-39). ~6 inline-section-padding leaks despite the layerStyle existing.

shadow_usage._comment: Both shadows only referenced from inside their own primitive recipe (card recipe, badge recipe). No external boxShadow:'card'/'badge' — the rgba box-shadows in Calendar:613, EventModal:55, CookieBanner:26, MagneticButton:27, Lightbox are inline literals NOT using these tokens.

radii_usage._comment: `pill` radius (100px) has ZERO usage — dead token, deletion candidate. `circle` (50%) used 8×.

easing_usage._comment: BOTH easings well-used and distinct in role. PASS 0 near-dup suspicion REFUTED — keep both.

duration_token_usage._comment: fast/normal/medium/slow/reveal all referenced. But ~46 inline animation/transition declarations bypass them with literal durations (1s, 0.9s, 1.2s, 1.3s, 0.3s, 0.4s, 0.5s, 0.6s, 0.8s, 2s, 4s, 32s, 280ms, 90ms, 60ms, 900ms, 600ms, 1.6s, 1.8s). No duration token >600ms exists, so 1s+ entrance/loop values have nowhere to map — MISSING-TOKEN flag (suggest `entrance`≈1s, plus loop durations are intentionally literal).

keyframe_usage._method: grep of animation refs across src (excluding panda.config.ts). Reference count + referencing files.
keyframe_usage._comment: NO zero-usage keyframes — every keyframe is referenced >=1×. PASS 0 deletion-suspects (glowDrift, rippleAnim, pulse) are all REFERENCED (glowDrift in not-found, rippleAnim in MagneticButton, pulse 4×). PASS 2 must verify each ref is an APPLIED `animation:` not a stale name, but none are dead by grep. Consolidation (not deletion) is the lever: 7 enter-family keyframes collapse to 1, 2 sweep, 2 loop-end, 2 pulse.

hand_rolled_chip_eq_Badge.signature: uppercase 2xs/label letterSpacing, color highlight, borderColor highlightFaint, ~3px/9px padding

hand_rolled_uppercase_link_with_arrow_eq.signature: color white/heading, borderBottom gray.700/divider, hover action, svg translate; TextLink primitive NOT adopted

hand_rolled_display_title_eq_textStyle.signature: fontFamily display + raw clamp fontSize + numeric lineHeight + uppercase; should be `textStyle:`

hand_rolled_eyebrow_kicker_eq_Eyebrow.signature: body 2xs uppercase label-letterSpacing semibold; Eyebrow primitive exists but not adopted

inline_section_padding_eq_layerStyle_sec.signature: paddingBlock sectionY + paddingInline content re-added by hand after a ground layerStyle
inline_section_padding_eq_layerStyle_sec._press_note: press/page.recipe.ts:46/50/127 re-rolls ASYMMETRIC 3xl-4xl padding — this is drift, NOT a legitimate variant. Normalize press to sectionY (rhythm:'normal'). The only two padding-Y rhythms are sectionY and sectionYLg; no third/tall token.

inline_sectionTitle_marginBottom_idiom.signature: css({ textStyle: 'sectionTitle', marginBottom: 'xl' }) — candidate SectionHeading slot/component

primitive_adoption._eyebrow_underadopted_comment: Eyebrow primitive adopted in only 2 consumers while 3+ hand-roll the same kicker.

content_note.note: lead copy 'Five past editions. Five #, …' is INTENTIONAL — the # references the editions' hashtag naming convention, not a placeholder. No action.
